sentiment: Decidedly risk-off and stagflation-fearful. EUR/USD at $1.14 on safe-haven USD demand; Asian equities lost $15B in a single session as Goldman slashed MXAPJ growth forecasts. Bearish Sentiment reading confirmed by Perplexity Finance dashboard as of March 15 close.
fed_policy: FOMC meets March 17-18. Rates held at 3.5-3.75% widely expected. Dual pressure of oil-driven inflation (WTI $98) and softening labour (92K Feb jobs) creates stagflation dilemma. Powell press conference March 18 is the pivotal risk event.
next_major_catalyst: FOMC decision + Powell press conference March 18 (20:00 CET); US February PPI March 18 (14:30 CET); ECB rate decision March 19 (13:45 CET); MU, FDX, ACN, CCL, DRI earnings March 18-19.

strategy_adjustments.macro-volatility: Prime window. WTI above $98, VIX near 28, back-to-back PPI + FOMC + ECB cluster this week. Favour vol breakout trades post-data rather than pre-positioning. Reduce index longs into FOMC. XAU/USD and USOIL are the cleanest trending instruments; EUR/USD short against safe-haven USD demand is a secondary theme.
strategy_adjustments.earnings-momentum: Dense 4-day earnings cluster (DLTR Mon, LULU/DOCU Tue, MU/WSM/GIS/JBL/FIVE Wed, ACN/FDX/DRI/BABA/CCL Thu). Pre-earnings run-ups carry extra risk this week given macro overlay. All pre-earnings positions must be flat BEFORE the print. Post-earnings gap plays (ORCL still live) are safer given defined entry after the binary risk has passed.
strategy_adjustments.post-shock: High-volatility regime creates fresh shock candidates daily. Focus on names with verifiable crash dates, non-structural triggers, and price stabilising above the crash low. SE at $86 (crashed from $118 on guidance miss), DLTR at $68 (crashed from $87 on restructuring), BNTX at $82 (hit 52-week low on trial failure), LULU at $158 (down 19% YTD). Require 1-2 session stabilisation before entry.
strategy_adjustments.crypto: BTC is the standout outperformer, +6% on the week vs S&P -1.6%, with $767M in ETF inflows and Strategy $776M BTC purchase. Institutional accumulation is decisive. Coinbase premium turned positive signalling US-led demand revival. Bear flag risk above $73-75K is the key technical warning. ETH elevated by BlackRock staked ETF launch on Nasdaq March 14. SOL, LINK, AVAX moving but remain low-conviction in high-vol macro.
strategy_adjustments.pair-trades: Regime-neutral pairs especially valuable into FOMC. Core themes: energy beneficiary vs airline victim (XOM/UAL, XOM/ALK, CVX/DAL), quality defensive vs reset growth (COST/WMT, LLY/NVO), BTC dominance over high-beta L1s (BTC/SOL), quality hyperscaler vs capex-heavy cloud (MSFT/AMZN), safe-haven gold miner vs beaten cyclical (NEM/CCL, GLD/SPY), defense vs leisure (LMT/CCL).

notes: All prices sourced from Perplexity Finance and cross-referenced with StockAnalysis, Investing.com, MarketBeat, Yahoo Finance as of Sunday March 15 2026, 20:00 CET. WTI crude rose 3.11% to $98.71 as Iran effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz; Goldman Sachs raised Brent target to $110. BTC posted 6% weekly gain driven by Strategy $776M purchase and $767M spot ETF inflows. EUR/USD slipped to $1.14 on risk-off USD demand. JPMorgan warned oil above $90 could spark 10-15% S&P 500 correction. BlackRock launched staked Ethereum ETF on Nasdaq March 14.
